data.name: NameMinLength
data.value: Name debe tener al menos {0} carácter.
data.comment: Validation error for name too short. {0} = min length (1)

data.name: NameMaxLength
data.comment: Validation error for name too long. {0} = max length (200)

data.name: HeightMinimum
data.value: Height debe ser al menos {0} cm (rango razonable para humanos).
data.comment: Validation error for height below minimum. {0} = minimum value (50)

data.name: HeightMaximum
data.value: Height no puede exceder {0} cm (rango razonable para humanos).
data.comment: Validation error for height above maximum. {0} = maximum value (300)

data.name: UnitSystemInvalid
data.value: UnitSystem debe ser un valor válido (Metric o Imperial).
data.comment: Validation error for invalid unit system enum

data.name: DateOfBirthCannotBeFuture
data.value: DateOfBirth no puede ser una fecha futura.
data.comment: Validation error for future date of birth

data.name: DateOfBirthTooOld
data.value: DateOfBirth no puede ser anterior a {0} años atrás.
data.comment: Validation error for date of birth too old. {0} = max age (150)

data.name: LanguageInvalid
data.comment: Validation error for invalid language code

data.name: GoalWeightMinimum
data.value: GoalWeight debe ser al menos {0} kg (rango razonable para humanos).
data.comment: Validation error for goal weight below minimum. {0} = minimum value (20)

data.name: GoalWeightMaximum
data.value: GoalWeight no puede exceder {0} kg (rango razonable para humanos).
data.comment: Validation error for goal weight above maximum. {0} = maximum value (500)
